sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Jump
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a Honda City hatchback that can jump over large gaps to reach higher sections of stages

special_mechanics.name: Oil Can Projectile
special_mechanics.description: Collectible oil cans that can be launched at police cars and traffic vehicles to temporarily stun them

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is a vehicle-control platformer with jumping mechanics, inspired by maze-chase games like Pac-Man. Sources mention the car can jump over gaps and that controls were criticized as poor in North American reviews, but no quantified movement data is available.
